  • EN

Compute Mack parameter variance for a single cohort

Source: R/cl.R
dot-mack_param_var.Rd

Internal helper computing:

$$ \mathrm{param}_{i,k+1} = f_k^2 \cdot \mathrm{param}_{i,k} + \hat{C}_{i,k}^2 \cdot \mathrm{Var}(\hat{f}_k) $$

Usage

.mack_param_var(value_proj, f_selected, f_var, last_obs)

Developed by Seokhoon Joo.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
